subcodes.first_line: O servant of God! 'Abdu'l-Bahá hath hearkened unto thy cries and lamentations, and hath become thy confidant and fellow-voice [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای بنده حق عبدالبهاء ناله و فغان ترا استماع نمود و با تو همراز گشت و هم آواز
subcodes.subjects: @spiritual emotions and susceptibilities, @expressions of grief; lamentation; sadness, @love as fire
